output.answer: Based on the available information in Wikidata, there is no specific Egyptian athlete recognized as one of the greatest in Olympic history with documented details about the medal they received. - "fuzzy": Retrieves items by overlap between their label words and the query keywords. The query keywords must not match label words exactly, but some fuzziness is allowed.
